articles.title: OpenAI Launches Three New AI Models With Different Speeds and Prices
articles.summary: A famous American artificial intelligence company called OpenAI has released three brand-new AI models at the same time. Each model is designed for a different purpose — some are faster, some are more powerful, and some cost less to use. This means people and businesses can choose the one that best suits their needs. AI models are computer programmes that can answer questions, write text, create images, and much more. As AI technology improves very quickly, companies all over the world are racing to build smarter and more useful tools. Experts say this kind of competition could change the way we work, learn, and solve problems in the future.

lv1: How many new AI models did OpenAI release at the same time? (OpenAI 同時發布了幾個新的人工智能模型？)
What can AI models do, according to the article? (根據文章，人工智能模型可以做甚麼？)
lv2: Why do you think OpenAI made three different models instead of just one? (你認為 OpenAI 為甚麼要推出三個不同的模型，而不是只推出一個？)
How might having AI models at different price levels affect students or families who want to use them? (提供不同價格的人工智能模型，會如何影響想使用它們的學生或家庭？)
lv3: Some people believe faster and cheaper AI tools will help students learn better, while others worry students will stop thinking for themselves. Which view do you agree with more, and why? (有人認為更快更便宜的人工智能工具有助學生學習，但也有人擔心學生會停止獨立思考。你比較認同哪種觀點？為甚麼？)
If AI companies keep competing to build more powerful models, what positive and negative effects might this have on society and the environment? (如果人工智能公司持續競爭開發更強大的模型，這對社會和環境可能帶來哪些正面和負面的影響？)

articles.title: China's Leader Sends Rare Goodwill Message to the US on Independence Day
articles.summary: For the first time in a long while, China's top leader Xi Jinping sent a special congratulatory message to the United States to mark American Independence Day on 4th July. This was unusual because China does not normally make such gestures public. Leaders of both countries have been working hard recently to repair their relationship after a long period of tension and trade disputes. When two powerful countries have a friendlier relationship, it can affect trade, travel, and safety for people all around the world, including in Hong Kong and Asia. Experts are watching closely to see whether this goodwill message marks the beginning of a more stable period between the two nations.

lv1: What special message did China's leader send to the United States? (中國領導人向美國發出了甚麼特別的信息？)
On which holiday did this message take place? (這個信息是在哪個節日發出的？)
lv2: Why is it significant that China publicly shared this congratulatory message, when it usually does not? (中國通常不公開這類賀電，為甚麼今次公開發布會是一件重要的事？)
How can the relationship between China and the United States affect people living in Hong Kong? (中美關係如何影響在香港生活的人？)
lv3: A friendly gesture between two countries does not always mean their problems are solved. Do you think one congratulatory message is enough to build lasting trust between China and the US? Why or why not? (兩國之間的友好姿態不代表問題已經解決。你認為一份賀電足以在中美之間建立持久的信任嗎？為甚麼？)

Some argue that when powerful countries compete, smaller countries and regions suffer the most. Do you agree? What responsibilities do powerful nations have towards the rest of the world? (有人認為當強國競爭時，較小的國家和地區受害最深。你同意嗎？強大的國家對世界其他地方有甚麼責任？)

articles.title: 廣西水庫決堤洪水成災　逾萬師生困教育園區獲救
articles.summary: 廣西橫州早前發生水庫決堤事故，大量洪水迅速湧入下游的貴港市，造成嚴重水浸。其中一個教育園區受洪水嚴重影響，水位一度急升，超過一萬二千名師生被困其中，情況十分危急。當局隨即展開大規模救援行動，動用「救援航母」等大型設備，最終成功將所有被困師生安全撤離。今次事件再次提醒我們，極端天氣和基礎設施安全對學校師生的影響不容忽視，社會各界需加強防災意識和準備。

lv1: 今次廣西洪災中，有多少名師生被困？
洪水是由甚麼原因引發的？
lv2: 為甚麼學校和教育園區在今次洪災中特別容易受影響？
救援人員如何幫助被困的師生脫險？
lv3: 極端天氣事件愈來愈頻繁，學校應如何更好地為學生準備應對各類災害？請從設施、課程和演習三方面提出建議。
有人認為政府應優先撥款改善水利基礎設施，以防類似水災再發生；也有人認為應先加強氣候教育。你認為哪個方向更重要？請說明你的理由。

articles.title: DSE下週放榜逾四成考生壓力高　港鐵暑假推小童免費跨境優惠
articles.summary: 香港中學文憑試（DSE）將於下週三（15日）公布成績。青年協會最新調查顯示，約45.6%的受訪學生表示承受較高壓力，顯示放榜前的心理健康問題值得社會關注。與此同時，港鐵宣布東鐵綫於暑假期間推出跨境乘車優惠，小童可免費往返羅湖或落馬洲站，成人乘客亦可享有即日來回車費折扣，方便市民趁暑假北上遊玩。兩則消息均與學生和家庭生活息息相關，引起廣泛關注。

lv1: 港鐵推出甚麼暑假優惠給小童乘客？
lv2: 為甚麼考試放榜前後，學生容易出現心理壓力？家長和學校可以如何提供支援？
港鐵推出跨境優惠對香港學生和家庭有甚麼好處？
lv3: 考試成績對年輕人的人生選擇影響深遠，但有人認為過分重視成績會損害學生身心健康。你認為香港的教育制度應如何在學業成就與學生福祉之間取得平衡？
隨著大灣區融合加深，香港學生北上升學或就業的機會增加。你認為這對香港年輕人的未來是機遇還是挑戰？請從不同角度分析。
